mnemonics.title: OGF vs EGF
mnemonics.content: Ordinary Generates Functions, Exponential Enumerates Groups: OGF for unlabeled, EGF for labeled structures.

acronyms.usage: Used to represent sequences through polynomial coefficients

visualTips.visualization: Imagine two polynomials multiplying - each term pairing creates new sequence terms

analogies.analogy: DNA of a sequence - contains complete information about its structure
